name: xmss_sign(M, SK.seed, idx, PK.seed, ADRS)
label: Algorithm 10

inputs.name: SK.seed
inputs.description: n-byte secret seed from SLH-DSA private key

inputs.name: idx
inputs.description: Index of the WOTS+ key within the XMSS tree to use for signing

inputs.name: PK.seed
inputs.description: n-byte public seed from SLH-DSA public key

inputs.name: ADRS
inputs.description: 32-byte address structure with layer and tree addresses set to the target XMSS tree

outputs.name: SIG_XMSS
outputs.description: (len + h') * n-byte XMSS signature, consisting of WOTS+ signature followed by authentication path

body_raw: for j from 0 to h' - 1 do
AUTH[j] ← xmss_node(SK.seed, k, j, PK.seed, ADRS)
